final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-editorial
Asset type: watercolor illustration, landscape orientation
Primary request: Provence lavender field pastoral scene in a quiet southern French village outskirts, rendered in transparent watercolor style
Scene/backdrop: sun-drenched countryside outside a small European town in southern France; vast purple lavender fields stretching toward distant rolling hills; a winding gravel path cuts through the field flanked by tall cypress trees in a row; an ancient stone windmill with an orange-red roof sits on a far hillside
Subject: foreground — an elderly farmer wearing a straw hat working among the lavender rows, beside a rustic wooden wheelbarrow piled high with harvested lavender bundles; midground — winding gravel path and cypress tree line; background — stone windmill on hillside, soft hills fading into distance
Style/medium: transparent watercolor illustration, light and airy brushwork, luminous washes, French pastoral romantic mood, warm and healing visual tone
Composition/framing: wide horizontal landscape, low horizon line, generous sky, foreground farmer as focal anchor, depth created by path leading eye to windmill
Lighting/mood: bright midday sunlight, cheerful and serene, warm golden light on orange rooftop, soft shadows under cypress trees, romantic and tranquil atmosphere
Color palette: deep violet and lavender purple for the fields, clear azure blue sky, fresh greens for cypress and foliage, warm orange-red for windmill roof, harmonious purple–blue–green–orange palette
Materials/textures: transparent watercolor washes with visible paper grain, soft wet-on-wet edges for sky and distant hills, loose gestural strokes for lavender rows, delicate linework for stone windmill details
Constraints: maintain transparent watercolor luminosity throughout; keep color palette harmonious and not muddy; elderly farmer and wooden wheelbarrow must be clearly readable in foreground
Avoid: digital-looking hard edges, photorealistic rendering, dark or gloomy tones, cluttered composition
